nodes.name: contact.html
nodes.source:
• Home
  • Books
  • About
  • Contact
Indiia Wilmott
  • Home
  • About
  • Contact
Books

Let's Connect

I'd love to hear from you — whether you're a reader, parent, teacher, or fellow book lover.

Send a Message

Your Name *
Your Email *
Subject
Message
Form functionality coming soon.

School Visits

I love visiting schools for interactive readings and storytelling sessions! Whether it's a classroom, library, or assembly — I bring stories to life with energy, imagination, and lots of fun.

Media & Press

For press inquiries, interviews, or media features, I'd love to chat. I'm always happy to talk about children's literacy, storytelling, and the craft behind creating picture books.

Connect Online

Find me around the web:

  • LinkedIn
  • indiia.me
  • Instagram — coming soon!
  • Twitter / X — coming soon!

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you visit schools?

Yes! I love visiting schools for read-alouds, storytelling sessions, and Q&A with students. Whether in-person in the Austin, Texas area or virtually anywhere in the world — let's make reading an adventure!

Can I get a signed book?

Signed copies will be available soon! I'm working on setting up a way for you to order personalized, signed editions. Stay tuned — and follow me on LinkedIn for announcements.

Are your books available internationally?

We're working on making my books available to readers all around the world! Currently you can find them through major online retailers, and international options are on the way.

Can you do virtual readings?

Absolutely! Virtual readings are a wonderful way to connect with classrooms, libraries, and book clubs no matter where you are. I bring the same energy and fun to virtual sessions as I do in person.

How can I invite you to an event?

Fill out the contact form above with details about your event — date, location, audience, and what you have in mind. You can also reach out through my LinkedIn.

Fan Art

Did my books inspire you to draw, paint, or create something? I'd love to see it!

Ask a parent or teacher to share your drawings with me through the contact form or on social media. I might even feature your artwork on my website someday!

Home About Books Contact

© 2026 Indiia Wilmott. All rights reserved.

nodes.name: about.html
nodes.source:
• Home
  • Books
  • About
  • Contact
Indiia Wilmott
  • Home
  • About
  • Contact
Books

About Indiia Wilmott

Author, storyteller, and voice-over artist based in Austin, Texas.

Why, How, What

Every story starts with a purpose. Here's the heart behind what I do.

Why

I believe every child deserves to see themselves in a story. I write because representation, imagination, and the warmth of a good book can shape how children see the world — and themselves.

How

I draw on my background in theatre, voice over, and performance to write stories that are meant to be read aloud — with rhythm, emotion, and characters that leap off the page.

What

I create children's picture books for readers ages 4 and up — heartfelt, beautifully illustrated stories that families love to share.

Hello! I'm Indiia Wilmott

I'm a children's book author and storyteller based in Austin, Texas. I write stories that spark imagination and fill young hearts with wonder — perfect for readers ages 4 and up.

Before I began putting stories on paper, I spent years bringing them to life on stage and screen. I'm an experienced actor with a background in voice over, theatre, television, and film.

I was part of the incredible team at ZACH Theatre from 1998 to 2003, one of Austin's most beloved cultural institutions. Those years taught me so much about the power of storytelling.

I studied at Radford University, where I honed my craft and discovered my deep love for creative expression.

My theatrical background shapes how I write: with rhythm, emotion, and voices that leap off the page. I believe every story is a little performance, and every reader deserves to feel like they're part of the adventure.

An Interview with Indiia

Learn more about my journey from stage to page.

My Journey

  • Education
    Radford University

    Studied the performing arts and discovered a lifelong passion for creative storytelling.

  • 1998 - 2003
    ZACH Theatre

    Performed and grew as an artist at one of Austin's most cherished theatre companies.

  • Ongoing
    Voice Over & Acting

    Built a versatile career across voice over, television, film, and theatre — bringing characters to life in every medium.

  • Now
    Children's Book Author

    Writing stories that spark imagination and wonder for young readers ages 4 and up.

What Inspires Me

Young Imaginations

There's nothing more magical than watching a child's eyes light up with wonder. I love creating stories that spark creativity, curiosity, and big dreams in little readers.

The Stage & Page

My years in theatre taught me the rhythm of a great story — the beats, the emotions, the surprise. I bring that theatrical energy into every book I write.

Austin, Texas

My home city is full of color, music, and creativity. Austin's vibrant spirit inspires the warmth and joy you'll find woven into all of my stories.

Explore My Books

Colorful adventures made for young readers.

See My Books
Home About Books Contact

© 2026 Indiia Wilmott. All rights reserved.

Books

Stories That Inspire Young Imaginations

Hi, I'm Indiia Wilmott — a children's book author, storyteller, and voice-over artist from Austin, Texas.

Why: I believe every child deserves to see themselves in a story.

How: I draw on my background in theatre and performance to write stories that are meant to be read aloud.

What: I create children's picture books for readers ages 4 and up.

Explore My Books Get to Know Me

Featured Books

Stories waiting to be discovered by little readers everywhere!

The Grandpa Who Lives in the Frame

Ages 4+

A heartwarming story about memory, love, and the special bond between grandparents and grandchildren.

Read More

Whiskers and the Magic Garden

Ages 4-6

A curious kitten discovers a garden where flowers can talk, bees can sing, and anything is possible!

Read More

Cloud Jumpers

Ages 6-8

Three friends discover they can jump from cloud to cloud in this high-flying adventure above the skies!

Read More
View All Books

Meet Indiia

I'm a children's book author and storyteller based in the heart of Austin, Texas. With a background in acting, voice-over, theatre, television, and film, I bring characters to life on the page the way I've always brought them to life on stage.

My years at ZACH Theatre, one of Austin's most beloved institutions, taught me the power of a great story — and now I channel that energy into creating magical worlds for young readers ages 4 and up.

Every story I write is an invitation to dream, laugh, and discover something new.

Read My Full Story

Hear From Indiia

Get to know the storyteller behind the books.

Fun Zone

Creative activities for little hands and big imaginations.

Coloring Pages

Download and color your favorite characters from Indiia's stories!

Story Time Videos

Watch Indiia read her stories aloud — bringing every character to life!

Reading Games

Fun interactive games inspired by the worlds inside the books!

Stay Updated

Sign up for updates on new books, events, and more.

No spam, just stories. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Home About Books Contact

© 2026 Indiia Wilmott. All rights reserved.

Books

About Indiia Wilmott

Author, storyteller, and voice-over artist based in Austin, Texas.

Why, How, What

Every story starts with a purpose. Here's the heart behind what I do.

Why

I believe every child deserves to see themselves in a story. I write because representation, imagination, and the warmth of a good book can shape how children see the world — and themselves. Stories have the power to build empathy, spark curiosity, and let young readers know they belong.

How

I draw on my background in theatre, voice over, and performance to write stories that are meant to be read aloud — with rhythm, emotion, and characters that leap off the page. Every book is crafted with the same energy I brought to the stage at ZACH Theatre: alive, expressive, and full of heart.

What

I create children's picture books for readers ages 4 and up — heartfelt, beautifully illustrated stories that families love to share. From The Grandpa Who Lives in the Frame to the adventures still to come, each book is an invitation to dream, laugh, and discover something new together.

Hello! I'm Indiia Wilmott

I'm a children's book author and storyteller based in Austin, Texas. I write stories that spark imagination and fill young hearts with wonder — perfect for readers ages 4 and up.

Before I began putting stories on paper, I spent years bringing them to life on stage and screen. I'm an experienced actor with a background in voice over, theatre, television, and film. There's nothing quite like the energy of a live performance — and I bring that same excitement into every word I write.

I was part of the incredible team at ZACH Theatre from 1998 to 2003, one of Austin's most beloved cultural institutions. Those years taught me so much about the power of storytelling and the joy it brings to audiences of all ages.

I studied at Radford University, where I honed my craft and discovered my deep love for creative expression. That foundation has guided me through every chapter of my career — and now, every chapter of my books.

My theatrical background shapes how I write: with rhythm, emotion, and voices that leap off the page. I believe every story is a little performance, and every reader deserves to feel like they're part of the adventure.

An Interview with Indiia

Learn more about my journey from stage to page.

My Journey

  • Education
    Radford University

    Studied the performing arts and discovered a lifelong passion for creative storytelling.

  • 1998 – 2003
    ZACH Theatre

    Performed and grew as an artist at one of Austin's most cherished theatre companies.

  • Ongoing
    Voice Over & Acting

    Built a versatile career across voice over, television, film, and theatre — bringing characters to life in every medium.

  • Now
    Children's Book Author

    Writing stories that spark imagination and wonder for young readers ages 4 and up.

What Inspires Me

Young Imaginations

There's nothing more magical than watching a child's eyes light up with wonder. I love creating stories that spark creativity, curiosity, and big dreams in little readers.

The Stage & Page

My years in theatre taught me the rhythm of a great story — the beats, the emotions, the surprise. I bring that theatrical energy into every book I write.

Austin, Texas

My home city is full of color, music, and creativity. Austin's vibrant spirit inspires the warmth and joy you'll find woven into all of my stories.

Explore My Books

Colorful adventures made for young readers.

See My Books
Home About Books Contact

© 2026 Indiia Wilmott. All rights reserved.
